titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the National Book Critics Circle Records
titlestmt.author: by Alison Clemens

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday December 12, 2018 at 04:05

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into four groupings: August 1992 Acquisition, September 1993 Acquisition, March 1994 Acquisition, and May 1994 Acquisition.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The National Book Critics Circle Records is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: National Book Critics Circle Records. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The National Book Critics Circle (NBCC), founded 1974, is the professional association of American book review editors and critics. The NBCC presents the National Book Critics Circle Awards yearly. Individuals involved in the NBCC include Herbert Leibowitz, Nina King, and Jack Miles.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, meeting minutes, financial papers, membership records, and printed material relating to the National Book Critics Circle. The National Book Critics Circle Awards deliberations and programs are especially well documented.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.

This collection received a basic level of processing in 2014, including rehousing and minimal organization. Various acquisitions associated with the collection have not been merged and organized as a whole. Each acquisition is described separately in the contents list below, identified by a unique call number and titled according to month and year of acquisition.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.
This collection includes materials previously identified by the call numbers Uncat ZA MS 264, Uncat ZA MS 387, and Uncat ZA MS 392

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Former call number: Uncat ZA MS 264

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This portion of the collection is not arranged in any particular order.

did.unittitle: National Book Critics Circle Journal volumes 1-16
National Book Critics Circle Journal assorted volumes

Treasurer's reports and assorted, Larry Swindell and Eliot Fremont-Smith
Invitation to join the National Book Critics Circle
Correspondence over incident involving Tom Disch
Jack Miles memos to the board

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Former call number: Uncat ZA MS 264

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This portion of the collection is arranged alphabetically by file title.

did.unittitle: Election ballots for the board, reviewer's citation, and best books

scopecontent.p: Former call number: Uncat ZA MS 387

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This portion of the collection is not arranged in any particular order.

did.unittitle: Printing for the National Book Critics Circle Journal
Deborah Zaik charges against Jack Marshall
Nona Balakian reviewer's citation entries not chosen for finals

scopecontent.p: Former call number: Uncat ZA MS 392

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This portion of the collection is arranged alphabetically by file title.

did.unittitle: "Writers of the Future" award panel discussion
